title: Arami

'''Arami''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Galov sector/Legends|Galov sector]]. A part of the area dominated by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Species/Legends|species]] as well as controlled by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Arami was one of three worlds where the Hutt holiday known as [[Boonta Eve/Legends|Boonta's Eve]] was celebrated, with the festivities including the [[Boonta Races]].

==Description==
Arami was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Holidays" /> located in the [[Arami system/Legends|Arami system]], a part of the [[Galov sector/Legends|Galov sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was situated on the [[Super-hyperroute/Legends|super-hyperroute]] known as the [[Triellus Trade Route/Legends|Triellus Trade Route]],<ref name="TEA" /> which linked it to the [[Opoku system]] as well as the [[Syvris system/Legends|Syvris system]] in the [[Al'Nasrl sector/Legends|Al'Nasrl sector]].<ref name="OuterRim">{{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-outer-rim-sectors|text=The Essential Atlas Extra: Outer Rim Sectors|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Arami system/Legends|Arami system]]</ref>

==History==
[[Realspace/Legends|Space]] surrounding Arami was [[Scout/Legends|explored]] between [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]] and [[3000 BBY]].<ref name="TEA" /> By the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the first campaigns of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], the planet fell within the borders of the sphere of influence of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Species/Legends|species]], and the Republic's [[Fourteenth Army|Fourteenth Sector Army]] was charged with engaging the [[Confederacy military/Legends|forces]] of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] in Arami's vicinity. The planet was located in the territory controlled by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] by [[17 BBY/Legends|17 BBY]].<ref name="EGTW Arami" />

==Inhabitants==
During the final [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] existence, it was one of the three worlds—the others being<ref name="Holidays" /> the [[Arkanis sector/Legends|Arkanis sector's]]<ref name="EAOC Tatooine Boonta">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Tatoo system/Legends|Tatoo]] and [[Dernatine system]]s</ref> [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] and [[Boonta/Legends|Boonta]]<ref name="Holidays" /> in the [[Tharin sector/Legends|Tharin sector]]<ref name="EAOC Tatooine Boonta" />—where the [[Standard year/Legends|annual]] Hutt holiday known as [[Boonta Eve/Legends|Boonta's Eve]] was celebrated. The holiday commemorated the Hutt [[Boonta Hestilic Shad'ruu/Legends|Boonta Hestilic Shad'ruu's]]<ref name="Holidays" /> ancient<ref name="EGTW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref> [[Invasion of Moralan|victory]] over the [[Parliament of Moralan]],<ref name="Holidays" /> and the festivites included the [[Boonta Races]].<ref name="Podracing">{{SW|url=news/this-is-podracing-sports-in-the-star-wars-galaxy-part-1|series=Sports in the Star Wars Galaxy|text=Part 1: This Is Podracing|nolive=1}}</ref> Around [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], the population of the Arami [[Star system/Legends|system]] numbered between one billion and ten billion.<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Arami was first mentioned in "[[Star Wars Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO]]," a [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] source article authored by [[Rich Handley]] and [[Abel G. Peña]] for use with the [[Wizards of the Coast]] ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' and published in the [[Polyhedron 170|170th issue]] of the ''[[Polyhedron]]'' magazine<ref name="Polyhedron170">{{PolyhedronCite|170|Star Wars Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO}}</ref> by [[June 3]], [[2004]].<ref name="Polyhedron170date">{{SWArchive|url=gaming/other/rpg/news20040603.html|text=Droids in ''Polyhedron''}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Arami system, and therefore Arami itself, in grid square T-13.<ref name="TEA" />
